project: OmniPresence Super Engine — Phase 11 The Free Data Moat

tasks.title: Keyless Google Trends demand index + related/rising
tasks.acceptance: Trends explore->widgetdata flow returns interest-over-time + related/rising queries; keywords blend a 0-100 demand index labeled data_source=trends_estimated (Keyword Planner stays the real bucketed upgrade); /v3/keywords/trends/live exposed; degrades to available=false on rate-limit.

tasks.title: Open-source tech-stack fingerprint detection
tasks.acceptance: Rule-based fingerprints over HTML/headers/cookies/meta detect frameworks, CMS, ecommerce, analytics, CDN and servers; /v3/tech/detect exposed; intelligence page shows competitor tech stacks labeled best-effort fingerprint.

tasks.title: Honest relative Popularity Index (never absolute traffic)
tasks.acceptance: Popularity Index (0-100) blends Tranco + Common Crawl referring domains + Wikipedia pageviews + domain age, explicitly labeled relative (not visits); /v3/domain/popularity/live exposed; surfaced per competitor.

tasks.title: Unified Authority Rating (AR 0-100, Ahrefs-DR-style, free signals)
tasks.acceptance: Authority Rating blends Tranco + Common Crawl referring domains + OpenPageRank (when OmniData active) + domain age; feeds the OmniPresence authority component and the AEO authority lever via domainAuthority.

tasks.title: Hacker News mentions + Wikipedia/Wikidata entity presence
tasks.acceptance: Algolia HN search adds real hacker_news mentions (platform constraint extended); Wikipedia + Wikidata presence boosts the AEO entity lever and is fetched during scans.

tasks.title: Bug fix + capability flags + UI + parity tests + docs + manifest v11
tasks.acceptance: runInstantPage word_count/images_without_alt bug fixed; keyless free-signal capability flags advertised; keywords table shows relative demand; parity tests cover tech-detect; Phase 11 spec + manifest v11 + loop skill + deploy/env docs updated; verify:all + omnidata:parity green.
